claim_short: 2601.19873 Problem 12 WU weak-star basic sequence in C_p(K)' C_p(X)^* for every infinite compact space exact reduction stronger partial result C_p(K)' has weak-star basic sequence iff C_p(K) has infinite-dimensional metrizable quotient iff quotient with Schauder basis iff weak-star closed subspace countable Hamel dimension Theorem 17 source gives metrizable quotient implies weak-star basic sequence reverse...
notes: registry_status=stronger_partial_result (Problem 12 reduced exactly to the infinite-dimensional metrizable quotient problem for C_p(K); convergent-sequence, non-Efimov, and fsJNP positive regions recorded) | review_focus=1. Check the reverse implication from weak-star basic sequence to metrizable quotient, especially the use of fsJNP versus no-fsJNP norm rigidity. 2. Check that closure is always taken in the relative dual Delta(K)=C_p(K)', not in the full Banach dual C(K)^*....
packet_title: Weak-Star Basic Sequences In C_p(K)': Exact Reduction
source_authors: Jerzy Kakol, Manuel Lopez-Pellicer, Wieslaw Sliwa
source_title: On weak*-basic sequences in duals and biduals of spaces C(X) and Quojections
